Container.Name: digital-dragon
Container.Overview: Digital Dragon is a local digital pet dashboard that grows from SABnzbd network and download activity.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port used to access the Digital Dragon dashboard.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent config folder. Digital Dragon stores pet_state.json here.

Config.Name: SABnzbd URL
Config.Description: Base URL for your SABnzbd instance, reachable from the Unraid server.

Config.Name: SABnzbd API Key
Config.Description: Your SABnzbd API key. Find it in SABnzbd settings.

Config.Name: Demo Mode
Config.Description: Set to true to run with demo data instead of live SABnzbd data.

Config.Name: Bind Host
Config.Description: Keep this as 0.0.0.0 inside Docker so the WebUI is reachable.

Config.Name: Internal Port
Config.Description: Internal app port. Keep this aligned with the container port unless you know you need to change it.

Config.Name: Pet State Path
Config.Description: Path inside the container where growth state is stored.
